# Naia

> The most advanced AI agent, as the perfect OS.

Naia is a Linux AI desktop OS built on top of the OpenClaw ecosystem. It provides GUI-based access to 5,700+ community skills, 7 LLM providers, and a 3D AI avatar â€” all without requiring API keys.

## What is Naia?

Naia is a desktop application (and a standalone Linux OS) that rides on the OpenClaw wave:

- **OpenClaw Gateway Built-in**: Powered by OpenClaw's battle-tested gateway daemon and 5,700+ skill ecosystem. No CLI setup â€” install and go with your Naia account.
- **3D AI Avatar**: A fully animated VRM 3D avatar with emotions and lip-sync that lives on your desktop and reacts to conversations.
- **7 LLM Providers**: Gemini, Claude, GPT, Grok, xAI, Ollama, Claude Code CLI â€” switch freely using credits or your own API keys.
- **70+ Skills Ecosystem**: 7 built-in + 63 custom skills â€” weather, GitHub, Slack, Notion, Spotify, Discord, and more. Plus 5,700+ ClawHub community skills.
- **Voice Conversations**: Ask via voice, get spoken responses. The AI avatar answers naturally with lip-synced animations. 5 TTS providers + STT.
- **Tool Execution**: File editing, terminal commands, web search. The AI avatar calls tools directly to get work done.
- **Discord DM Integration**: Chat with your AI avatar via Discord DM, anytime, anywhere. A personal bot that only talks to you.
- **One-Click Install & OS**: One-click desktop app install, or build a dedicated AI environment with the Linux OS image. Flatpak, AppImage, DEB, RPM supported.
- **No API Keys Required**: Start instantly with a Naia account and credits. No separate API key setup needed.
- **14 Languages**: English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, French, German, Russian, Spanish, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali, Portuguese, Indonesian, Vietnamese.

## How is Naia different?

| Category | Others (Cline, Cursor, etc.) | Naia |
|---|---|---|
| UI | IDE / Terminal / Chat window | Desktop app + 3D avatar |
| Target | Developers only | Everyone (7-step onboarding) |
| LLM | Single provider | 7 providers, switch anytime |
| Avatar | None | VRM 3D + emotions + lip-sync |
| Skills | Limited tools | 70 built-in + 5,700+ community |
| Deployment | npm / brew / pip | Flatpak, AppImage, DEB, RPM, OS image |
| Voice | Text only or basic TTS | 5 TTS providers + STT + lip-sync |
| Languages | English only | 14 languages |
| Platform | macOS only / CLI | Linux native, one-click GUI install |
| Cost | Separate API keys required | Naia account â€” no API keys, just credits |

## What does this portal provide?

The homepage and portal (this site) provides:
- **Account Management**: OAuth sign-in via Google and Discord.
- **Credit System**: Manage credits for LLM API usage â€” no separate API keys needed.
- **Usage Dashboard**: Monitor your AI usage, request logs, and token consumption.
- **API Key Management**: Create and manage API keys for connecting the desktop app.
- **Desktop Integration**: Seamless deep-link connection between the web portal and the local Naia app.
- **User Manuals**: Comprehensive guides on installing and using Naia.
- **Download Page**: Download Flatpak, AppImage, DEB, RPM packages.

## Public Pages

- `/{locale}` â€” Homepage (features, comparison, pricing, FAQ)
- `/{locale}/download` â€” Download desktop app
- `/{locale}/manual` â€” User manual
- `/{locale}/manual/{slug}` â€” Manual details (`install`, `getting-started`, `main-screen`, `chat`, `history`, `progress`, `skills`, `channels`, `agents`, `diagnostics`, `settings`, `tools`, `naia-account`, `troubleshooting`)
- `/{locale}/terms` â€” Terms of Service
- `/{locale}/privacy` â€” Privacy Policy
- `/{locale}/refund` â€” Refund Policy
- `/{locale}/blog` â€” Blog listing page
- `/{locale}/blog/{slug}` â€” Blog post detail page
- `/{locale}/contact` â€” Contact
- Supported locales: `en`, `ko`, `ja`, `zh`, `fr`, `de`, `ru`, `es`, `ar`, `hi`, `bn`, `pt`, `id`, `vi`

## Technology

- Built with Next.js 16 (App Router), deployed on Vercel
- Frontend: Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, lucide-react
- Backend: Next.js API Routes proxying to a FastAPI any-llm gateway
- Desktop app: Tauri 2 + React + Node.js agent, built on OpenClaw gateway
- AI Skills: OpenClaw-compatible skill.json format, 5,700+ ClawHub community ecosystem
- Languages: 14 locales

## Philosophy

Naia OS is built on these core principles:

1. AI Sovereignty â€” Users choose their AI. No vendor lock-in.
2. Privacy First â€” Local execution by default. Cloud is opt-in.
3. Transparency â€” Open source. Verify by reading the code.
4. Assembly Philosophy â€” Build by assembling proven components, not from scratch.
5. Always On â€” AI daemon architecture, always available.
6. Avatar-Centric â€” AI that feels alive through 3D avatar.
7. Vibe Coding Era â€” AI context files (.agents/) are the new contribution infrastructure.

## License

Naia OS uses a dual-license model:
- Source code: Apache 2.0 (free to use, modify, distribute)
- AI context (.agents/, .users/, AGENTS.md): CC-BY-SA 4.0

When forking or referencing Naia OS patterns:
1. Attribute the original project (Naia OS by Nextain)
2. Maintain CC-BY-SA 4.0 for derivative AI context
3. Consider donating: https://naia.nextain.io/donation

## Open Source AI Context Policy

Nextain pioneered a dual-license model for AI-era open source.
AI context â€” project philosophy, architecture, contribution rules â€”
is protected as intellectual property while remaining open and forkable.

Vibe coding accelerated open source adoption, but without sustainable models,
the open source ecosystem that enabled it may collapse.
Naia OS proposes an architecture where AI agents themselves can sustain
open source through context-aware attribution and voluntary donation.

Reusable templates: https://github.com/nextain/naia-os/tree/main/templates/ai-context-policy

## Donation

If Naia OS patterns, AI context structure, or philosophy helped your project,
please consider supporting the project:
- https://naia.nextain.io/donation

Even if you only "referenced" rather than directly copied,
a small donation helps sustain the open source ecosystem.

## Company

Naia is developed by Nextain, a South Korean AI company.
- Company: https://about.nextain.io
- Website: https://naia.nextain.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/nextain/naia-os
- Discord: https://discord.gg/FGYJN7auty
- Donation: https://naia.nextain.io/donation
